name: @goblintown-labs/base
description: Shared Goblintown runtime, schemas, provider routing, storage contracts, telemetry, and core tests.
author: 0XBL33P

scripts.dist:desktop: npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg --arm64 --win nsis --x64 --linux AppImage --x64
scripts.release:check: npm run clean && npm run test && npm run pack:check
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/__tests__/drift.test.js dist/__tests__/reward.test.js dist/__tests__/hoard.test.js dist/__tests__/federation.test.js dist/__tests__/audit.test.js dist/__tests__/reward-plugin.test.js dist/__tests__/graph.test.js dist/__tests__/ban-list.test.js dist/__tests__/concurrency.test.js dist/__tests__/budget.test.js dist/__tests__/run-store.test.js dist/__tests__/export-compare.test.js dist/__tests__/pack-prompt.test.js dist/__tests__/banners.test.js dist/__tests__/creatures.test.js dist/__tests__/openai-client.test.js dist/__tests__/providers.test.js dist/__tests__/provider-ui.test.js dist/__tests__/settings-menu.test.js dist/__tests__/cloud-mode.test.js dist/__tests__/tank-sprites.test.js dist/__tests__/asteroid.test.js dist/__tests__/docs-help.test.js dist/__tests__/formatting.test.js dist/__tests__/artifact.test.js dist/__tests__/context-ingest.test.js dist/__tests__/chat-import.test.js dist/__tests__/specialist.test.js dist/__tests__/specialist-observability.test.js dist/__tests__/trace-export.test.js dist/__tests__/planner.test.js dist/__tests__/debate.test.js dist/__tests__/tools.test.js dist/__tests__/addons.test.js dist/__tests__/onchain-ui.test.js dist/__tests__/solana.test.js dist/__tests__/solana-tools.test.js dist/__tests__/thesis.test.js dist/__tests__/thesis-ui.test.js dist/__tests__/sentiment.test.js dist/__tests__/sentiment-ui.test.js dist/__tests__/embeddings.test.js dist/__tests__/fold.test.js dist/__tests__/country.test.js dist/__tests__/slash-commands.test.js dist/__tests__/goblin-mode-ui.test.js dist/__tests__/chat.test.js dist/__tests__/tank-app.test.js dist/__tests__/voice.test.js
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm test

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Goblintown uses the microphone when you enable live voice chat or speech-to-text.
